name: Linguine with White Clam Sauce#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the clams and reserve the liquid. Set aside.
2. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray and place over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Add onion and sauté until tender.
4. Add the reserved clam liquid; reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
5. Stir in the clams, parsley, garlic powder, and pepper. Cook until thoroughly heated.
6. Combine the clam mixture and linguine in a large bowl. Toss well.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and serve immediately.
